players.name: Salesforce Einstein
players.offerings: AI-powered CRM with predictive lead scoring, opportunity insights, and automated activity capture
players.target_customers: Enterprise and mid-market B2B sales teams
players.differentiators: Deep CRM data integration, 150,000+ customer base, broad ecosystem

players.name: HubSpot Sales Hub
players.offerings: AI email assistant, deal intelligence, conversation analysis, automated sequences
players.differentiators: Freemium entry point, inbound marketing flywheel, strong SMB brand

players.name: Outreach
players.offerings: Sales engagement platform with AI-driven sequencing, sentiment analysis, and revenue forecasting
players.differentiators: Deep workflow automation, Kaia real-time meeting coaching, broad integrations

players.name: Salesloft
players.offerings: Revenue orchestration with AI cadence optimisation, deal intelligence, and forecasting
players.differentiators: Acquired Drift for conversational AI; strong enterprise contracts

players.name: Gong
players.offerings: Conversation intelligence, deal risk scoring, pipeline forecasting from call/email data
players.target_customers: Enterprise sales teams with high call volume
players.differentiators: Best-in-class call analysis accuracy, $250M+ ARR, strong NPS

players.name: Apollo.io
players.offerings: B2B data + sequencing + AI email writer, all-in-one prospecting
players.differentiators: 270M contact database, aggressive pricing, high growth trajectory

startups.velocity_note: Significant Series A/B activity in 2023-2024 with $117M known funding across 5 startups.

market_scan.notes: TAM figure from MarketsandMarkets (2024). CAGR from Grand View Research. Both sources agree on strong double-digit growth driven by LLM adoption in enterprise sales workflows.

judgement.summary: 6 incumbents identified. 5 startups ($117M known funding). TAM ~$6.8B. CAGR ~21.3%. Market opportunity supports entry.
